# Piush Bose | Software Engineer

> Piush Bose, an Indian software engineer in his early 25s, is a passionate developer with a keen interest in Rust,
> Go, Cloud Computing, and Distributed Systems. He has a strong background in building scalable and efficient
> software
> to explore new technologies and frameworks. Piush is known for his problem-solving skills and his ability to write
> clean, efficient code. In his free time, he enjoys contributing to open-source projects and sharing his knowledge
> through blog posts and tutorials.

- [Tokio Architecture Explained: Scheduler, Reactor, Timers, and Tasks](https://piush.in/blog/tokio-under-the-hood-how-rusts-async-runtime-actually-works)
- [How to Encrypt .env Files with dotenvx (Python Rust Guide)](https://piush.in/blog/encrypting-your-env-files-with-dotenvx-stop-leaking-secrets)
- [How WhatsApp End-to-End Encryption Works (Signal Protocol Explained)](https://piush.in/blog/how-whatsapp-secures-billions-of-messages-with-end-to-end-encryption)
